summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: 'Acompanhamento' category (replacing 'Dúvida'), Reversa fields in Arrependimento, and 'codigo_fornecedor' display. All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed all new features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning: width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0
ui_bugs.impact: Charts display correctly but generate console warnings - existing issue

codigo_fornecedor_display.details: API returns codigo_fornecedor field, UI displays 'Cód. Fornecedor: 00A0000C0L' in product section
